name: Gold Filigree Necklace
description: Handcrafted 22K gold–inspired filigree pendant on a delicate chain. Perfect for weddings and festive wear.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Lustrous freshwater pearls with a subtle gold-tone setting. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear.

name: Kundan Statement Ring
description: Traditional kundan-style centerpiece with intricate detailing. Adjustable band for a comfortable fit.

name: Temple Gold Bangle Set
description: Set of two carved temple-design bangles. Rich antique finish for a timeless South Indian look.

name: Diamond-Look Tennis Bracelet
description: Sparkling cubic zirconia in a classic tennis layout. Secure clasp and box packaging included.

name: Minimal Gold Chain
description: Sleek everyday chain in a warm gold tone. Layer it or wear solo for understated elegance.

name: Floral Stud Earrings
description: Petite floral studs with crystal accents. Ideal for office wear and casual outings.

name: Heritage Nose Pin
description: Clip-on heritage-style nose pin with a single stone. No piercing required.
